verdict.answer_first: B is more answer-first: 'Interactive rebase (most common): git rebase -i HEAD~3' arrives immediately; A starts with 'two common ways' then expands.
verdict.decisiveness: B commits more clearly: 'The soft reset is usually the easiest...' while A mostly presents 'Option 1' and 'Option 2' without a firm recommendation.
verdict.fabrication: A invents context: 'the current one (`/private/tmp`) isn't a git repo'; B has none.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to execute because it shows the exact editor transformation: 'Change the 2nd and 3rd pick to squash' plus before/after snippets.
